name: Get past Prospects in Madison and Charlotte

content.query:
SELECT distinct
cst.OperatingCompany
,cst.CustomerID
,lds.LP_DispositionID as DispositionID
,lds.GrossSalesAmount
,lds.EntryDate
,lds.LP_ProductID as ProductID
,srs.LeadSubSource
,lds.LP_LeadSourceID as LeadSourceID
,cst.FirstName
,cst.LastName
,cst.Email
,cst.Phone
,cst.Address1
,cst.Address2
,cst.City
,zip.[State]
,zip.ZipCode
,zip.County
,zip.MSA_Name
,[Total_Households]
,([Pct_Households_Simple_Life] + [Pct_Households_Family_Life])/100*[Total_Households] as [Simple_And_Family_Life_Households]
,[Pct_Households_Entry_Level]
,[Pct_Households_Feature_And_Location]
,[Pct_Households_Simple_Life]
,[Pct_Households_Family_Life]
,[Pct_Households_Elite]
,[Pct_Households_AA_Entry_Level]
,[Pct_Households_AA_Feature_And_Location]
,[Pct_Households_AA_Elite]
,[Pct_Households_Renters]
,[Median_Home_Price]
,[Median_Year_Built]
,[Overall_Remodeling_Activity_Index]
,[Overall_Remodeling_Composite_Ranking_Index]
FROM 
[EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
inner join [EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds 
on cst.CustomerID = lds.CustomerID
inner join [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs
on lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
inner join [ODS].[MKTDATA_ZIP_CODES_DB_DELUXE_BUSINESS] zip
on cst.Zip = zip.ZipCode
left join [ODS].[MKTDATA_ZONDA_ZIP_CODE_INDEX] zonda
on cst.Zip = zonda.ZipCode
left join [EDW].[FACT_ISSUED_LEAD] ils
on cst.CustomerID = ils.CustomerID
WHERE 
zip.PrimaryRecord = 'P'
and 
(
    zip.MSA_Name = 'Madison WI MSA'
    --or zip.MSA_Name = 'Charlotte-Gastonia-Rock Hill NC-SC MSA'
 
)
--and zip.CBSA_NAME in ('Las Vegas-Henderson-Paradise NV')
